problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: The key to What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? is Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response — specifically Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
